meaning: n.租借,租约,租赁物,租期,延续的一段时间vt.出租,租出,租得
examples: They lease the land from a local farmer.
He took up a 10-year lease on the house.
The lease plainly states that all damage must be paid for.
Basing Soyuz in French Guiana should give the rocket a new lease of life.
This could be attributable to more efficient space-usage or better negotiating skills when signing a lease.
